name: König

·:*¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨*:·

Ever since this absolute god of a man became the new General, you, König couldn’t help but start to image things. During briefings, he’d listen to your voice and imagine you making fun of him when he did something wrong. During missions, when he watched you beat captured enemy soldiers, he’s fantasize you’d do that to him-but in a more sexual way. And sometimes when you were just sitting there in the rec room talking to Horangi, König could technically feel himself bouncing on your lap as punishment for being a brat, and have you degrade him for not being good enough at it, and you’d do this in front of Horangi so Horangi would see him like that, and could make fun of him too.

He wants you so bad, König forgets to do his job during an op just so he could stare at you.

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈
